markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 504. License Plates
##### § 504.152 — Applicability of Other Law

Except as otherwise provided by this subchapter or a rule adopted under this subchapter, a digital license plate issued under this subchapter is subject to the laws of this state applicable to a physical license plate.

*Added by Acts 2019, 86th Leg., R.S., Ch. 594 (S.B.604), Sec. 3.01, eff. September 1, 2019.*

subsections.text: Except as otherwise provided by this subchapter or a rule adopted under this subchapter, a digital license plate issued under this subchapter is subject to the laws of this state applicable to a physical license plate.
